item.title: About
item.description: Juniper is killing it with their free training and practice tests for ALL entry-level exams, plus a handful of their specialist and professional level ones too! Check out their Open Learning platform to get started: Get Started with Free Juniper Training. Once you’ve soaked up all that knowledge, you can take their voucher assessment test. Pass with a 70% or higher, and BAM! You get a discount code for the actual exam on Pearson Vue, bringing the price down to a whopping $50!
